<a id="class-textline"></a>

# TextLine

**Inherits:** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Holds a line of text.

## Description

Abstraction over [TextServer](class_textserver.md#class-textserver) for handling a single line of text.

| [HorizontalAlignment](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-horizontalalignment)   | [alignment](#class-textline-property-alignment)                         | `0`     |

| [Orientation](class_textserver.md#enum-textserver-orientation)                      | [orientation](#class-textline-property-orientation)                     | `0`     |

<a id="class-textline-property-alignment"></a>

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-textline-method-add-object"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **add_object**(key: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant), size: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2), inline_align: [InlineAlignment](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-inlinealignment) = 5, length: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = 1, baseline: [float](class_float.md#class-float) = 0.0) [🔗](#class-textline-method-add-object)

Adds inline object to the text buffer, `key` must be unique. In the text, object is represented as `length` object replacement characters.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-add-string"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **add_string**(text: [String](class_string.md#class-string), font: [Font](class_font.md#class-font), font_size: [int](class_int.md#class-int), language: [String](class_string.md#class-string) = "", meta: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant) = null) [🔗](#class-textline-method-add-string)

Adds text span and font to draw it.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-clear"></a>

 **clear**() [🔗](#class-textline-method-clear)

Clears text line (removes text and inline objects).

---

<a id="class-textline-method-draw"></a>

 **draw**(canvas: [RID](class_rid.md#class-rid), pos: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2), color: [Color](class_color.md#class-color) = Color(1, 1, 1, 1), oversampling: [float](class_float.md#class-float) = 0.0)  [🔗](#class-textline-method-draw)

Draw text into a canvas item at a given position, with `color`. `pos` specifies the top left corner of the bounding box. If `oversampling` is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-draw-outline"></a>

 **draw_outline**(canvas: [RID](class_rid.md#class-rid), pos: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2), outline_size: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = 1, color: [Color](class_color.md#class-color) = Color(1, 1, 1, 1), oversampling: [float](class_float.md#class-float) = 0.0)  [🔗](#class-textline-method-draw-outline)

Draw text into a canvas item at a given position, with `color`. `pos` specifies the top left corner of the bounding box. If `oversampling` is greater than zero, it is used as font oversampling factor, otherwise viewport oversampling settings are used.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-duplicate"></a>

[TextLine](#class-textline) **duplicate**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-duplicate)

Duplicates this **TextLine**.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-inferred-direction"></a>

[Direction](class_textserver.md#enum-textserver-direction) **get_inferred_direction**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-inferred-direction)

Returns the text writing direction inferred by the BiDi algorithm.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-line-ascent"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_line_ascent**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-line-ascent)

Returns the text ascent (number of pixels above the baseline for horizontal layout or to the left of baseline for vertical).

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-line-descent"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_line_descent**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-line-descent)

Returns the text descent (number of pixels below the baseline for horizontal layout or to the right of baseline for vertical).

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-line-underline-position"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_line_underline_position**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-line-underline-position)

Returns pixel offset of the underline below the baseline.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-line-underline-thickness"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_line_underline_thickness**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-line-underline-thickness)

Returns thickness of the underline.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-line-width"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_line_width**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-line-width)

Returns width (for horizontal layout) or height (for vertical) of the text.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-object-rect"></a>

[Rect2](class_rect2.md#class-rect2) **get_object_rect**(key: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant))  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-object-rect)

Returns bounding rectangle of the inline object.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-objects"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array) **get_objects**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-objects)

Returns array of inline objects.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-rid"></a>

[RID](class_rid.md#class-rid) **get_rid**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-rid)

Returns TextServer buffer RID.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-get-size"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_size**()  [🔗](#class-textline-method-get-size)

Returns size of the bounding box of the text.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-has-object"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_object**(key: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant))  [🔗](#class-textline-method-has-object)

Returns `true` if an object with `key` is embedded in this line.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-hit-test"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **hit_test**(coords: [float](class_float.md#class-float))  [🔗](#class-textline-method-hit-test)

Returns caret character offset at the specified pixel offset at the baseline. This function always returns a valid position.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-resize-object"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **resize_object**(key: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant), size: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2), inline_align: [InlineAlignment](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-inlinealignment) = 5, baseline: [float](class_float.md#class-float) = 0.0) [🔗](#class-textline-method-resize-object)

Sets new size and alignment of embedded object.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-set-bidi-override"></a>

 **set_bidi_override**(override: [Array](class_array.md#class-array)) [🔗](#class-textline-method-set-bidi-override)

Overrides BiDi for the structured text.

Override ranges should cover full source text without overlaps. BiDi algorithm will be used on each range separately.

---

<a id="class-textline-method-tab-align"></a>

 **tab_align**(tab_stops: [PackedFloat32Array](class_packedfloat32array.md#class-packedfloat32array)) [🔗](#class-textline-method-tab-align)

Aligns text to the given tab-stops.
